# Cantara

> Norwegian open source community and knowledge base. 2,290 articles on software architecture, agile development, microservices, IAM/SSO, and enterprise integration. Archive of wiki.cantara.no (2008–2022).

Cantara is a Norwegian non-profit open source community founded in 2008. The name means "bridge" in Arabic — bridging government, education, industry, and the software community. Mission: mature and empower Norwegian software development through knowledge sharing, collaboration, and open source projects.

Owned by the Norwegian Software Development Foundation (Stiftelsen for fremme av programvareutvikling i Norge).

## Key Pages

- [Home](https://cantara.github.io/wiki/): Overview and navigation
- [Projects](https://cantara.github.io/wiki/projects/): Major open source projects
- [Repository Index](https://cantara.github.io/wiki/repos/): 143+ GitHub repositories across 11 project families
- [Knowledge Base](https://cantara.github.io/wiki/knowledge/): Hub for architecture, agile, SOA, and more
- [Whydah IAM/SSO](https://cantara.github.io/wiki/whydah/): Identity Provider and SSO platform (165 pages)
- [Software Architecture](https://cantara.github.io/wiki/architecture/): DDD, microservices, patterns (125 pages)
- [Agile Development](https://cantara.github.io/wiki/dev/): CI/CD, testing, clean code, Maven (478 pages)
- [Open Web Services & SOA](https://cantara.github.io/wiki/OWSOA/): REST, enterprise integration, patterns (154 pages)
- [Enterprise Architecture](https://cantara.github.io/wiki/EA/): EA frameworks, EDR, code generation (82 pages)
- [Community & Events](https://cantara.github.io/wiki/PE/): GeekCruises, CiA conference, Smidig (211 pages)
- [IASA Oslo](https://cantara.github.io/wiki/IASA/): Oslo chapter of International Association of Software Architects (159 pages)

## Full Content (machine-readable)

- [Full profile and content index (clean markdown)](https://cantara.github.io/wiki/llms-full.txt): All projects, knowledge base sections, repositories, and community content

## Open Source Projects

**Whydah** — Production SSO/IAM platform. OAuth2, OpenID Connect, LDAP, high availability. 19 repositories.
**ConfigService + JAU** — Runtime configuration management and automatic Java application updates.
**Xorcery** — Event sourcing and reactive microservices framework.
**Messi** — Messaging abstraction layer (AWS S3, SQS, Kinesis, GCS, filesystem providers).
**Visuale** — Real-time dashboard for microservice environment monitoring.
**ACS** — Competence and CV management platform with skill search.

GitHub: https://github.com/Cantara (143+ repositories)

## Quick Facts

- **Founded:** 2008, Oslo, Norway
- **Content:** 2,290 articles (archived 2008–2022, GitHub index updated weekly)
- **Repositories:** 143+ across 11 project families
- **Key technologies:** Java, Spring, AWS, Docker, Kubernetes, LDAP, Kafka, Neo4j
- **Languages:** Norwegian and English
- **Community events:** GeekCruises (annual boat workshops), CiA conference, Smidig, DevHouse, IASA Oslo
